body.title: Role-based ticket assignment: apprentice/builder/creator/master/guru
body.text:
# D-role-ladder-2026-06-03
**title:** Role-based ticket assignment: apprentice/builder/creator/master/guru
**date:** 2026-06-03
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-role-ladder-schema, T-audit-role-fit, T-granny-dispatch-role-map, T-granny-escalate-closed, T-consequence-role-ladder
**goal_link:** G-factory-of-factories
**concept_links:** C-prescient-agents-pa20

## Decision narrative
Replace direct worker assignment (worker=claude|dicksimnel) with role-based ticketing (role=apprentice|builder|creator|master|guru). "Builder" is a capability envelope — DS + specific models + features — not a process name; when models improve, Builder's ceiling rises without touching ticket descriptions. Granny maps role→available workers at dispatch time. Ticket audit gains a role-fit check: L/XL architectural tickets filed as Builder get flagged at creation, not discovered at max-iter HOLD. Failure feedback closes the loop: when DS hits max-iter, the system annotates "scope exceeded Builder ceiling" rather than silently holding.

Root trigger: ~9 tickets accumulated in HOLD over 2026-06-02 because scope exceeded DS's capability ceiling but was only discovered at runtime (post-OR exhaustion). CC is the only available builder while OR is dry and Google AI Studio setup is pending (2026-06-03 morning).

## Hypothesis
HOLD accumulation from role-mismatch drops to zero; Builder-ceiling failures are caught at audit time (filing) not at runtime (HOLD after max-iter).

## Measurement Signal
Audit emits "role-fit violation" on over-scoped tickets at filing; HOLD records with "max iter" signature decrease; tickets route to correct capability tier without manual triage.

## Goal Link
G-factory-of-factories — building the factory that builds the builders.

## Concept Links
C-prescient-agents-pa20

## Provenance
Absorbed from ~/TheIgors/lab/design_docs/decisions/D-role-ladder-2026-06-03.md 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical; original status: open.
